case_title: OLBIN LOPEZ VS. PINOCCHIO, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,997.27 AS TO DEFENDANT PINOCCHIO, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA TRATTORIA PINOCCHIO
